🏔️

Canadian Rockies sampler

Example 5-day Banff corridor

Glacier lakes ridges parkway spine

Tester One

📅 2026-09-10 → 2026-09-14 · 5 days

Overview

Arrive Calgary, push quickly into Banff town for two glacier-lake mornings, dedicate one Icefields Parkway sprint toward Jasper windows, recover with a mellow Bow Valley egress day, then swing back to Calgary for wheels-up.

  • Bear spray etiquette: transport outside reach in rental cars per park signage.
  • Sunrise Morraine/Louise logistics need headlamps shuttle research each season closure.

Itinerary

Morning
11:05 AM
Land Calgary fetch rental
Clear customs loop long enough for restroom before garage shuttle.
late Morning
Afternoon
Afternoon
Drive AB-1 shoulder timing
Canmore fuel cheaper than townsite—optional pit stop groceries.
drive
Evening
Evening
Banff Avenue orientation walk
Skip heavy dinner jetlag—café grazing fine.
Morning
Early morning
Shuttle or early self-drive corridor
Parking fills fast—aim pre-0700 shoulders late sleepers skip sunrise.
early Morning
Mid-morning
Lakeshore to far boathouse pacing
Carry traction devices if icy shoulder storms surprise September.
scenic
Afternoon
Afternoon
Moraine reschedule buffer
Road opens vary—maintain slack if diverted back to Johnston alternate.
Evening
Evening
Hot tub recovery pass
Altitude mild headache normal—hydrate aggressively.
🐻
Carry compliant food storage in Subaru rentals—never loose snacks cab rear.
Morning
Morning
Breakfast pack cooler
Services sparse midpoint—coffee thermos disciplined.
Late morning
Bow Lake shoulder photo stop
Watch traffic pullouts respect coaches.
scenic
Afternoon
Midday
Peyto boarded catwalk brisk
Windproof shell—glacial fetch constant.
Evening
Evening
Jasper townsite dinner quieter square
Return drive next morning symmetrical fatigue management.

Bus glacier step optional if pacing allows cash buffer.

Meal cues often live inline on each itinerary day.
For cross-cutting reminders, reuse overview bullets:

  • Bear spray etiquette: transport outside reach in rental cars per park signage.
  • Sunrise Morraine/Louise logistics need headlamps shuttle research each season closure.

Reference

cr-panel-parkway

## Parkway etiquette quicklist

- Pullouts use flashers early—coaches accelerate surprisingly fast egress.
- Fuel Banff tank before Peyto—you will not casually refuel midpoint cheap.
- Wildlife jam distance law—telephoto etiquette beats selfie proximity.

TripPWA · TripTemplate schema 3.0.0 · rev 1
